LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MAHER MEMARZADEH'S MOTION TO FILE RECORDS UNDER SEAL. NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER/PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SEAL COUNSEL'S DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF HIS MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED, AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN PER CAL. R. CT. 2.550. PLAINTIFF IS STRONGLY ADVISED TO AVOID DISCLOSING ANY PRIVILEGED COMMUNICATIONS WITH HIS COUNSEL OR OTHER CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION IN ANY OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION AND TO LODGE SUCH OPPOSITION CONDITIONALLY UNDER SEAL. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; NOT REPORTED. (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-23-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference).
Atty. Francisco A. Gutierrez, Esq., counsel for Plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD RE: PETITIONER MAHER MEMARZADEH.

Matter called. The Court states that in these types of matters that an in camera hearing will be held. The Court provides Mr. Gutierrez the telephone number to call at 10:15 a.m. to conduct the in camera hearing.

The in camera hearing is held.

At the conclusion of the in camera hearing, the motion for withdrawal of attorney of record re: petitioner Maher Memarzadeh is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Records Under Seal
Off Calendar Apr-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER MAHER MEMARZADEH'S Motion To File Records Under Seal.

No appearances. The tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Petitioner/Plaintiff's motion to seal counsel's declaration in support of his motion to be relieved as counsel is granted. No opposition filed, and good cause shown per Cal. R. Ct. 2.550. Plaintiff is strongly advised to avoid disclosing any privileged communications with his counsel or other confidential information in any opposition to the motion and to lodge such opposition conditionally under seal.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
